modal.canStillView: You can still view the information, but it will not be possible to apply for this scholarship.
modal.internalFeesDisclaimer: Some fees are paid directly to the university, while others are processed through our platform.
modal.internalFeesNotice: This scholarship may have additional internal fees from the university. These fees will be visible after payment of the Selection Process Fee.
modal.internalFeesConditionalNote: The fee depends on the student's process or visa type and then corresponds with the fee

modal.ds160PackageDescription: Fee required for students of type {{type}}
modal.reinstatementPackageDescription: Fee required for transfer students who have an inactive/terminated visa status.

header.title: Scholarship Selection
header.subtitle: Browse through the scholarships and select which ones you would like to enroll in (maximum of 4). You must choose at least one to proceed.

errors.loadError: Error loading scholarships. Please try again.
errors.alreadyLocked: You have already passed the scholarship review. It is not possible to change the selection.
errors.updateError: Error updating selection. Please try again.
errors.selectRequired: Please select at least one scholarship to continue. Click on the scholarship cards above to add them to your selection.

review.title: Review Your Selected Scholarships
review.warningTitle: Important: This is a definitive choice
review.warningDescription: By confirming, you will no longer be able to change the chosen scholarships. Please carefully review your selection below before proceeding.

completed.title: Scholarship Selection
completed.subtitle: Scholarship selection successfully completed.
completed.cardText: You have already selected your scholarships and passed the review. This step is complete.

noResults.title: No scholarships found
noResults.description: Try adjusting your filters to see more options.

confirmationModal.title: Confirm Selection
confirmationModal.description: By confirming, you will no longer be able to change your selected scholarships. Please carefully review your selection before proceeding.

quickGuide.title: Quick guide:
quickGuide.step1: Use filters to search by university or scholarship value
quickGuide.step2: Click any scholarship card to add it to your selection
quickGuide.step3: Select as many as you want - you can choose multiple options
quickGuide.step4: Click "Continue" once you've selected at least one scholarship
